name: Feature Request

labels: enhancement

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature or sample you'd like to see.

## Use Case
Describe the problem or scenario this feature would solve.
Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Power Apps Components
What Power Apps components or features would this involve?
- [ ] Canvas App
- [ ] Data sources (specify): 
- [ ] Custom connectors
- [ ] Power Fx formulas
- [ ] Components
- [ ] Other: 

## AI Assistance Opportunities
How would AI tools (GitHub Copilot, Claude Code) help with this feature?

## Alternative Solutions
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Sample Code (Optional)
If you have any example code or formulas, please share them here:

Paste code here
